svg.title: Aquaburst sprite sheet — 4 mutations × 4 animation states
svg.desc: Aquaburst: graceful water creature with fluid elegance. 16 frames across Tidal Blue, Pearl White, Abyssal Dark, and Coral Rose mutations.
svg.text: Water · Common · Graceful fluid elegance · Fav: Shell chime
Each frame (above) represents one 128×128 export tile
